acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence records the M2 audit residual risk and the exact direct-capture helper reproducibility boundary.
The Linux dev environment exposes or documents the required Wayland/GBM build tools for the helper path.
A bounded build/preflight command proves the helper path is reproducible.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Orchestrator rerun: nix develop -c just direct-capture-preflight

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No product capture, portal, capture-to-NVENC, zero-copy, cross-device, decode, render, presentation, or latency claim is made.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The preflight compiles and links symbols only; docs and notes explicitly disclaim runtime/product claims.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: `nix flake check` and `nix develop -c just check` pass.

realWorldValidation.evidence: The node validates repo-supported build/preflight reproducibility only; live capture remains separate hardware evidence.
